message:
fix(sync): resolve borrow conflict in OwnedWriteFuture poll

Clones the Arc<RwLock<T>> before acquiring the state lock to avoid
borrowing conflict between self.lock and self.counted mutations.

Also fixes unsafe code in test helpers by using safe Unpin-based polling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
